server_type_played: Private — mid rate, Private — high rate
main_class_played: Dark Knight / Blade Knight, Magic Gladiator
server_start_preference: Fresh start every few months (seasonal resets)
season_preference_reason: Classic balance is tighter. Modern seasons add bloat that dilutes the core loop.
content_priority: PvP and dueling, Guild wars / Castle Siege, Min-maxing builds and stats
reset_system_preference: Soft resets (keep some bonuses, reset level)
progression_pace: Balanced — 1-2 weeks to a strong character
rng_upgrade_tolerance: Some RNG is fine if odds are clearly shown
afk_farming_stance: Nice to have but should be limited
auto_hunt_opinion: Fine if capped per day (e.g. 4h limit)
economy_model: Mixed (NPC floor prices + free player trading)
market_feature: All of the above — give me options
pvp_pve_preference: Heavy PvP — I live for player combat
pk_system_preference: Karma / penalty system (turn red for killing)
castle_siege_interest: Very interested — it's the best endgame content
blessing_concept_reaction: Sounds interesting, want to know more
blessing_type_preference: XP / leveling boost, Drop rate increase, Upgrade success rate boost
blessing_duration: Short bursts (1-4 hours) — use when active
blessing_open_feedback: As long as PvP blessings can't be bought with real money, I'm in. The moment money = damage, I'm out.
spending_willingness: I spend occasionally when something is worth it
acceptable_purchases: Cosmetic skins and visual effects, Quality-of-life (extra storage, stash tabs)
past_quit_reasons: Game became too P2W, Server population died
retention_drivers: Regular content patches and updates, Competitive leaderboards and rankings, Fresh start / wipe seasons
notification_preference: World boss spawns, New content patches, Wipe / season reset announcements
biggest_mu_pain_point: Server admins who abuse item drops and ruin the economy. No transparency, no trust.
dream_feature: Transparent upgrade odds shown in the UI, like a live probability meter. Stop hiding the math.
